_comment: Android update manifest. Each release: bump versionCode in build.gradle.kts AND here, then upload the APK with: gh release upload current Wander.apk --repo faisal-nabulsi/wander-site --clobber (binaries are NOT committed to this repo).
notes: Stability fixes: fixes a rare freeze where the location could stick after stopping a route, corrects long-distance teleports that could crawl instead of jumping, makes the soft-ban cooldown survive an app restart, and turns on GPS 'breathing' so a parked location looks more natural.
